title: Man From Hell
description: Adds a new scary mob to the game.
body:
## _~~Who is lurking in the darkness~~_
Adds a brand new mob into the game with a few more features to scare you!

This mob is able to break glass, doors sometimes the mob spawns at night and has horror sound effects to go with!

![Mob](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5e9083a384c89445c6b4c0ac1fa51312964f562.png)

![Mob](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d502df03477374502d46b56e65a215a159cbd4ae.png)
